creator: alt2600@icloud.com
text: the sheer number of ways python dependencies are tracked in pkg database leave layers of fun trying to rebuild lots of packages. half way through the $REBUILD2 list of 4 llvm rebuilds I noticed llvm12 wasn't showing up but had a presence in site-packages. so I decided to break out and retest after i noticed talloc was in $REBUILD2 group but not $REBUILD list where samba and tevent show up following UPDATING instructions. but after talloc was built, tevent built, and samba416 is packaging up now and installing. so tricky to follow dependencies, but not a bug with this port
